name: Carpool Coordinator
description: Organize recurring carpool rotations for school, sports, or activities — assign drivers by day, handle swap requests, and surface pickups on the shared family calendar.

source.query: SELECT a.id AS id, c.name AS title, c.location AS subtitle, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.pickup_time, ''), a.date) AS when_at, a.driver_id AS member_id, (a.status = 'done') AS done FROM app_carpool__assignments a JOIN app_carpool__carpools c ON c.id = a.carpool_id AND c.archived = 0 WHERE a.date = :today AND a.status != 'skipped' ORDER BY c.pickup_time LIMIT 20
